summary: Script uses proper bash idioms (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, die/error handling) but workflow fails core requirements: (1) references non-existent tests/label-assigner.bats—workflow will fail when executed; (2) act-result.txt is hardcoded (lines 65–71) with fake results instead of capturing real output—violates requirement to parse/assert actual test results; (3) actions not SHA-pinned (best practice violation). Script's glob-to-regex conversion works but regex building is fragile/complex. Manual tests embedded in workflow (lines 43–76) partially compensate but contradict TDD requirement (write failing test FIRST). Missing comprehensive test file is critical gap.
